positive: A whimsical storybook illustration of a tiny, adventurous fox wearing a backpack, meeting a bioluminescent owl in a magical forest glen. Storybook art, gouache painting, warm golden hour lighting, detailed woodland setting, Pixar style, joyful, charming.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, aggressive, scary, modern tech, harsh lines
